title: INSITE: Integrating scRNAseq for Tcell Engineering
author: Aryan, Kaveh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the datasets and pipeline for INSITE, a computational framework for integrating single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) data of T-cells to improve immunotherapy design.
steps_raw: This repository contains the datasets and pipeline for INSITE, a computational framework for integrating single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) data of T-cells to improve immunotherapy design.
